NDTV Internship 2026: Earn Up to ₹10,000 Per Month as an Anchoring Intern | Apply Before July 3

NotesGallery Bureau | Published: 7/6/2026
Google AdSense - AMP Inline

NDTV Internship 2026: Are you passionate about technology, gadgets, artificial intelligence, and content creation? If yes, then here’s an exciting opportunity that could kickstart your career in digital media and technology journalism. NDTV Gadgets360 has officially announced its Anchoring Internship 2026, offering students and fresh graduates a chance to work with one of India’s leading technology media platforms.

The internship offers a monthly stipend of up to ₹10,000, hands-on industry exposure, mentorship from professionals, and an opportunity to build a strong portfolio in the rapidly growing tech media industry.

If you have confidence in front of the camera and love talking about technology, this internship is worth considering.

About NDTV Gadgets360

NDTV Gadgets360 is among India’s most trusted technology news and reviews platforms. It covers everything from smartphone launches and gadget reviews to artificial intelligence, gaming, consumer electronics, science, and emerging technologies.

Over the years, Gadgets360 has built a strong reputation for delivering reliable technology news, detailed reviews, buying guides, comparison tools, and engaging video content. Millions of users across India rely on the platform for the latest updates in the tech world.

As part of the NDTV network, Gadgets360 provides an excellent learning environment for aspiring media professionals and technology enthusiasts.

NDTV Internship 2026 Overview

Internship Role and Responsibilities

Selected interns will play an important role in creating engaging video content related to technology and innovation.

Present Technology-Focused Content

Interns will anchor and present videos covering topics such as:

  • Latest smartphone launches
  • Gadget reviews
  • Artificial Intelligence updates
  • Consumer electronics
  • Technology trends
  • Industry news and developments

Simplify Complex Topics

One of the primary responsibilities will be breaking down complex technology concepts into simple and understandable explanations for a wider audience.

Build an On-Camera Presence

Candidates will get an opportunity to improve their presentation skills and develop a confident, professional on-screen personality.

Create Engaging Storytelling

Interns will contribute to making technology news more informative, engaging, and entertaining through creative storytelling techniques.

Internship Location

The internship will be conducted at NDTV’s office in Delhi. Candidates residing in Delhi or willing to relocate for the internship duration can apply.

Working in a professional newsroom environment will allow interns to gain real-world experience and understand how large media organizations operate.

Duration of Internship

The NDTV Anchoring Internship will run for a total duration of six months.

The extended internship period provides enough time for candidates to learn industry practices, improve communication skills, and build valuable professional experience.

Stipend and Benefits

One of the biggest advantages of this internship is that it offers both learning opportunities and financial support.

Monthly Stipend

Selected candidates will receive a stipend ranging between:

₹8,000 to ₹10,000 per month

Additional Perks

Apart from the stipend, interns will also receive:

  • Internship Certificate
  • Letter of Recommendation (LOR)
  • Practical industry exposure
  • Networking opportunities
  • Mentorship from experienced professionals
  • Portfolio-building opportunities

These benefits can significantly strengthen a student’s resume and future job prospects.

Who Can Apply?

This opportunity is suitable for:

  • Undergraduate students
  • Postgraduate students
  • Recent graduates
  • Aspiring journalists
  • Content creators
  • Technology enthusiasts
  • Media and communication students
  • Individuals interested in anchoring and presenting

Candidates with strong communication skills and an interest in technology-related topics will have an advantage during the selection process.

Skills That Can Improve Your Chances

Although the official notification does not mention strict eligibility criteria, possessing the following skills can increase your chances of getting selected:

  • Excellent verbal communication
  • Public speaking abilities
  • Confidence in front of the camera
  • Knowledge of technology and gadgets
  • Storytelling skills
  • Video presentation skills
  • Social media awareness
  • Basic understanding of AI and emerging technologies

Why Should You Apply?

The technology and digital media industries are growing rapidly, creating demand for professionals who can communicate technical information effectively.

This internship provides a unique combination of:

  • Media exposure
  • Technology industry experience
  • Anchoring practice
  • Content creation opportunities
  • Professional development

Working with a reputed platform like NDTV Gadgets360 can help you gain practical experience that will be valuable for careers in journalism, media production, content creation, technology communication, and digital marketing.

Application Deadline

Interested candidates must submit their applications before:

3 July 2026

Since internships at reputed media organizations attract a large number of applicants, it is advisable to apply as early as possible.

How to Apply for NDTV Internship 2026?

Eligible candidates can submit their applications online through the official Internshala application page.

Apply Here: https://internshala.com/internship/detail/anchoring-internship-in-delhi-at-ndtv-worldwide1780473473

Before applying, make sure your resume highlights relevant skills such as communication, public speaking, content creation, video production, and technology-related interests.

Selection Process

While the company has not officially disclosed the complete selection process, shortlisted candidates may be evaluated based on:

  • Resume screening
  • Communication skills
  • Interest in technology
  • Anchoring abilities
  • Content presentation skills
  • Interview performance

Candidates with previous experience in public speaking, YouTube content creation, college events, or social media content may have an added advantage.

Final Thoughts

The NDTV Internship 2026 for Anchoring Interns is an excellent opportunity for students and fresh graduates looking to gain practical experience in technology journalism and digital media. With a stipend of up to ₹10,000 per month, six months of industry exposure, and valuable certification benefits, this internship can become a strong foundation for a successful career in media and technology.

If you are passionate about gadgets, technology trends, AI, and presenting content in front of an audience, don’t miss this opportunity. Submit your application before July 3, 2026, and take the first step toward building a rewarding career in the tech media industry.

FAQs

What is the stipend offered in the NDTV Internship 2026?

Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend ranging from ₹8,000 to ₹10,000.

What is the duration of the internship?

The internship will be conducted for six months.

Where is the internship located?

The internship location is Delhi.

What is the last date to apply?

The application deadline is 3 July 2026.

Is a certificate provided after completion?

Yes, selected interns will receive an internship certificate and a letter of recommendation.
